languages.text: Если на военном совете последние сомнения Себериана и свиты связаны с мечом, можно предъявить, что клинок — подделка.

traits.locale_text: Если на военном совете последние сомнения Себериана и свиты связаны с мечом, можно предъявить, что клинок — подделка.

languages.text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.
languages.original_text: Если на военном совете последние сомнения Себериана и свиты связаны с мечом, можно предъявить, что клинок — подделка.

traits.locale_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.
If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.
If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.
If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

languages.text: Richten sich während des Kriegsrates die letzten Zweifel Seberians und seines Gefolges auf das Schwert, kann die Klinge möglicherweise als Fälschung präsentiert werden.
languages.original_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

traits.locale_text: Richten sich während des Kriegsrates die letzten Zweifel Seberians und seines Gefolges auf das Schwert, kann die Klinge möglicherweise als Fälschung präsentiert werden.

languages.text: Si, pendant le conseil de guerre, les derniers doutes de Seberian et de son entourage se portent sur l'épée, il sera possible de montrer qu'elle est fausse.
languages.original_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

traits.locale_text: Si, pendant le conseil de guerre, les derniers doutes de Seberian et de son entourage se portent sur l'épée, il sera possible de montrer qu'elle est fausse.

languages.text: 如果在军事议会上，塞贝里安和随从们最后的疑虑都落于此剑，就可以揭穿其为赝品。
languages.original_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

traits.locale_text: 如果在军事议会上，塞贝里安和随从们最后的疑虑都落于此剑，就可以揭穿其为赝品。

languages.text: Si durante el consejo de guerra las últimas dudas de Seberian y su séquito recaen sobre su espada, cabe la posibilidad de anunciar que se trata de una falsificación.
languages.original_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

traits.locale_text: Si durante el consejo de guerra las últimas dudas de Seberian y su séquito recaen sobre su espada, cabe la posibilidad de anunciar que se trata de una falsificación.

languages.text: 戦争評議会で、セベリアンと従者たちが最後に抱いた疑問が剣に関わるものであった場合、その剣は偽物であると告発することができる。
languages.original_text: If, at the council of war, the last doubts of Seberian and retinue involve the sword, it can be charged that the blade is a fake.

languages.text: Savaş konseyi sırasında Seberian ve maiyetinin son şüpheleri kılıca bağlanırsa kılıcın sahte olduğu öne sürülebilir.
languages.original_text: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.

traits.locale_text: Savaş konseyi sırasında Seberian ve maiyetinin son şüpheleri kılıca bağlanırsa kılıcın sahte olduğu öne sürülebilir.
